section_name: Dealer Transfer of Certain Assembled Vehicles Prohibited
text:
(a) In this section, “assembled vehicle” and “replica” have the meanings assigned by Section 731.001 (Definitions) .

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.013 — Dealer Transfer of Certain Assembled Vehicles Prohibited

(a) In this section, “assembled vehicle” and “replica” have the meanings assigned by Section 731.001 (Definitions) .

(b) Ownership of an assembled vehicle, other than a replica, may not be transferred to or by a dealer under this chapter.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1079 (H.B.1755), Sec. 8, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: In this section, “assembled vehicle” and “replica” have the meanings assigned by Section 731.001 (Definitions) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Ownership of an assembled vehicle, other than a replica, may not be transferred to or by a dealer under this chapter.
